violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Food stored on the floor in the Walk-in freezer of both the Deli and Meat department

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Raw ground beef was stored next to and above raw bacon.--Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Buns stored next to raw turkey in the meat department walk-in cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Duct tape in the refrigerator on the edges of the shelves are not smooth or cleanable.--Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Dishes being dried on foam matts in both the Deli and Produce departments. Carboard partition next to the hand sink in the Deli department is not nonabsorbent and cleanable.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The inside of the microwave in the Deli department needs cleaning.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not designed and/or constructed properly. Sink in the produce department, being used to wash dishes is only a single sink instead of a 3 compartment sink.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Sink is being used to clean dishes as well as hand washing.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Bare wood floor in the Meat department walk-in freezer is not a smooth and cleanable surface.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Deli department walk-in freezer floor and the floor beneath the cooking equipment need cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Several broken or missing floor tiles in all 3 departments.
Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. Fly strip was placed above the hand sink in the Deli department.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. Whole roasted chickens in the warmer were only temping at 124 degrees and employee could not verify when they had been placed in the warmer.
